series_metadata.series_description: Monthly, quarterly, trimester, and annual reports compiled for the Federal government, ODJFS, and County agencies involving public assistance and social services programs for historical, management, and performance purposes. Programs include but are not limited to Ohio Works First (OWF), Child Care, DA Financial, Food Assistance, and Refugee Social Services reporting.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in record center for 10 years ,review by State Archives before disposal. ; Electronic: Retain in office 10 years, thendestroy provided audits arecompleted, reports are releasedand all discrepancies areresolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
